field_changes.current: Stake size primary-verified 2026-07-18; the observation that neither Forbes.cz nor CzechCrunch mentioned this reciprocal stake is CLM-51 (assessment).

field_changes.previous: As part of the acquisition, Vít Schlesinger became a shareholder of Able.cz s.r.o. itself (registered 29 July 2025) — a reciprocal equity stake not mentioned in the Forbes.cz or CzechCrunch coverage, which described only Able acquiring Blackfish, not Schlesinger receiving Able equity.
field_changes.current: As part of the acquisition, Vít Schlesinger became a shareholder of Able.cz s.r.o. itself — exactly 5.00 % (vklad 12,185.75 CZK), registered 29 July 2025.
